query:
INSERT INTO teams_webhooks (
            id, tenant_id, user_id, webhook_url, channel_name, created_at, is_active
        ) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, NOW(), true)
        ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, user_id)
        DO UPDATE SET
            webhook_url = $4,
            channel_name = $5,
            updated_at = NOW(),
            is_active = true
